## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate.py --skills-dir skills`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check_repository.py`
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Installer behavior was tested only against an isolated destination, if changed.

## Compatibility and provenance

- [ ] Supported-environment claims remain evidence-based.
- [ ] Approval, dispatch, source locks, licenses, and notices remain intact.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and provenance records are updated when applicable.
